meta.title: Core Control Unit | Engineering & Digital Solutions
meta.description: Core Control Unit is a French software engineering company specialising in system architecture and custom digital solutions.

hero.taglineSub: We design and build the websites and apps your business runs on, and put your brand on billboards across the US.

services.heading: Services
services.subtitle: From custom websites to nationwide billboard campaigns and bespoke apps. We build, ship, and get your brand seen.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Websites and web apps for individuals and businesses. We deliver full source code or handle hosting via Vercel or custom infrastructure. Your call.

items.title: Billboard Marketing
items.description: Physical advertising across the United States through our private billboard network. Nationwide reach, targeted placement, high impact.

items.title: Bots & Custom Apps
items.description: Discord bots, Telegram bots, and standalone desktop applications tailored to your workflow. If it can be built, we build it.

items.title: Smart Contract Audit
items.description: Security audit of your Solidity smart contracts. We identify vulnerabilities, logic flaws, and gas inefficiencies with a detailed report.

items.title: Smart Contract Development
items.description: Custom Solidity smart contract development: tokens, NFTs, DeFi protocols, custom on-chain logic. Built secure from the ground up.

items.title: Web3 Integration
items.description: Connect your existing website or app to the blockchain. Wallet connection, on-chain data, contract interaction, seamlessly integrated.

about.heading: About
about.p1: Core Control Unit is a digital services company spanning web development, custom software, and physical billboard marketing across the United States, with blockchain expertise on hand when a project calls for it.
about.p2: We work directly with individuals, startups, and small businesses. No middleman, no overhead. You get clear communication, fast turnaround, and code you actually own.
about.p3: Operating internationally with a remote-first approach, we handle projects end-to-end: from the first line of code to the billboard going live.

contact.heading: Start a project
contact.subtitle: Describe your project. We respond within 48h.
contact.placeholderProject: Describe your project, your current stack, your constraints...

items.title: US Billboard Campaign
items.description: Nationwide billboard campaign for a consumer brand: coordinated placement across 12 states, handled end-to-end from creative design to live boards.

items.title: E-commerce Web App
items.description: Next.js storefront with Stripe integration, custom CMS, and Vercel hosting. Delivered with full source code transfer to the client.

items.title: Community Discord Bot
items.description: Custom bot managing a 20k-member community: automated onboarding, moderation tools, and live event notifications. Built for a private client.

cookies.notice: This site uses only essential technical cookies.

legal.title: Legal notice
legal.editorType: Simplified joint-stock company (SAS) with share capital of XXX €
legal.editorActivity: Business activity: computer programming, websites, and any application
legal.editorPhone: Phone: +33 X XX XX XX XX
legal.ipText: All content on this site (texts, images, graphics, logo, icons, etc.) is the exclusive property of Core Control Unit, protected by French and international intellectual property laws. Any reproduction, distribution or use without prior authorisation is strictly prohibited.
legal.dataText: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR — EU 2016/679) and the French Data Protection Act, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
dataRights: Right of access to your data
Right to rectification of your data
Right to erasure (right to be forgotten)
legal.dataContact: To exercise these rights, use the form below or contact us at contact@ccunit.com. We are committed to responding within 30 days.
legal.dataLegal: Legal basis for processing: legitimate interest (commercial contact form) and explicit consent (marketing communications).
legal.cookiesText: This site does not use tracking or advertising cookies. Only strictly necessary technical cookies may be set. No data is shared with third parties for advertising purposes.
legal.rgpdSubtitle: Use this form to exercise your rights regarding your personal data. We acknowledge receipt within 72h and process your request within 30 days.
